name: write_sysdef
short_description: Writes hardware definition for use in the software development
full_help:
write_sysdef

Description: 
Writes hardware definition for use in the software development

Syntax: 
write_sysdef  [-force] [-hwdef <arg>] [-bitfile <arg>] [-pdifile <arg>]
              [-meminfo <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] <file>

Returns: 
success/failure status of applied action.

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-force]    Overwrites the existing hardware definition file
  [-hwdef]    Input Hardware definition file 
  [-bitfile]  Bitstream file 
  [-pdifile]  PDI file for Versal 
  [-meminfo]  BRAM file 
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>      System definition file (Values: A filename with alphanumeric 
              characters and .sysdef extention.) 

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Overwrites the existing hardware definition file
Suspend message limits during command execution
